name: Lincoln
bio:
After witnessing his mother being harmed by a vampire, he swore revenge. He became the President of the White House and transforms into a vampire hunter at night, upholding justice with the National Guardian Divine Axe.

Role: Magical Debuff
Specialty: A front-midline Breakthrough-type hero that can apply debuffs like Poison; effectively counters multi-healer lineups.

skillSlots.name: Judgment Berserker Axe
skillSlots.description: Attacks a single enemy target for 176% M.DMG, with a 60% chance to apply [Poisoned].

skillSlots.name: Doom Judgment
skillSlots.description: Attacks 4 random enemy targets for 122% M.DMG with 60% probability to apply [Illusion].
